description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Linux/MacOS Build that runs on push and pull requests to the master branch. Use a matrix strategy to build and test on multiple operating systems (macos-latest, ubuntu-20.04), compilers (g++-9, clang++), build types (Release, Debug), and task backends (Threads, OneTBB, PaRSEC, LegacyTBB). For each job, install prerequisites, configure CMake, build, test, and optionally install and test the installation tree.
